name: IRC_RAC_ACTION_ITEMS
description: This table stores the list of action items which are supposed to be shown to the team member in recruiting activity center.

columns.Name: ACTION_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: This column will be used to store the primary key of this table. Auto Generated Key.

columns.Name: SUBSCRIBER_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the information about the subscriber for which this action item is supposed to be displayed. Lookup used for this - ORA_IRC_RAC_SUBSCRIBER

columns.Name: SUBSCRIBER_TYPE_CODE#01
columns.Comments: Stores the information about the subscriber for which this action item is supposed to be displayed. Lookup used for this - ORA_IRC_RAC_SUBSCRIBER

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the object id for a given subsriber. For eg - If Subscriber is SUBMISSIONS , then it will be submissionId . If subscriber is OFFER then it will be offerId etc.

columns.Name: SUBJECT
columns.Comments: Subject associated to the OBJECT_ID for which the Action Item applies

columns.Name: SUBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Subject type associated to the OBJECT_ID for which the Action Item applies

columns.Name: ACTION_DATE
columns.Comments: This column stores the date when the action was supposed to be taken care of.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status of each action item.Lookup used - ORA_IRC_ACTION_ITEM_STATUS

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: If this action item was executed by the ESS Job , the respective request id will be stored here.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
